purpose: SolarPro Global — beta-testing invitee list (Nigeria solar suppliers & installers)
schema_notes: Same shape as ghana_beta_invitees.json. Each entry has a verified email collected from the company's own website or ENF directory listing on 2026-06-10. Only entries with confirmed public email addresses are included.

entities.name: Rubitec Solar
entities.services: Solar PV, hybrid inverters, backup systems, mini-grid systems, COREN-certified installation training, commercial and industrial projects, agro-solar pumping
entities.address: 5 Talabi Street, off Adeniyi Jones Avenue, Ikeja, Lagos
entities.notes: Self-described as integrated renewable energy company and IPP.

entities.name: Solarity Plus Limited
entities.services: Solar design + installation for residential and commercial, nationwide service

entities.name: SolarKobo
entities.services: Nationwide solar installations, instant online cost estimate, panels + inverters + batteries
entities.notes: Online-first quote tool, fast install turnaround (2-5 business days).

entities.name: Powertech Solar Energy Co Limited
entities.services: Off-grid / on-grid / mini-grid PV, smart grid + storage, central + string + outdoor inverters, technical consultancy and training
entities.address: 16 Bariga Road, Adeshina Bus-Stop, Bariga, Lagos

entities.name: SMK Solar Nigeria
entities.services: Hybrid inverters, LiFePO4 batteries, panels, solar refrigeration, solar lighting; turnkey installation with same-day completion
entities.address: Service centres in Lagos, Kano, Benin, Uyo

entities.name: Solynta Energy
entities.services: 1-4 kW residential solar packages, energy assessments, 7-day install window, 26-state coverage
entities.address: 1B Etim Iyang Close, Off Etim Iyang Crescent, Victoria Island, Lagos
entities.notes: Tagline 'displace your generator'. Claims 2000+ MW deployed.

entities.name: Infinite Eco Tech
entities.services: Solar panel + inverter installation + repair + maintenance, panel cleaning, swimming-pool design as side service

entities.name: Solar Shop Nigeria
entities.services: Online solar store — panels, inverters, batteries, accessories

entities.name: Solar Depot Nigeria Limited
entities.services: Multi-city retail + nationwide shipping, hybrid solar inverters, deep-cycle batteries, panels
entities.address: Lagos: Adegbola Adigun Street, Greenfield Estate, Opic, Isheri | Abuja: Flat 3 Block 17 Borno Street, Area 10 Garki | Ibadan: 46 Hope Road, Old Ife Road, Alakia
